name: Thai Pineapple Fried Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Green onions, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry garlic in oil over medium heat until golden brown.
2. Increase the heat to medium high and add chicken, pork, and shrimps. Cook until the meats are almost done.
3. Add eggs and scramble. Once halfway through cooking, add rice and pineapple, mixing quickly.
4. Sprinkle sugar, white peppers, fish sauce, and green onions over the mixture. Continue to cook for about 2 minutes longer, stirring constantly.
5. Remove from heat. Serve hot with sliced pickles, chili peppers, and garnished with chopped cilantro. Makes 12 servings.
NOTE: Cook rice with slightly less water than usual because it will absorb juice from the meats, preventing it from becoming soggy.
